name: Upgrade: Scouting 1
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Scouting Lens from high quality lenses and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.

effect.u_message:
Somehow, you understand the statue is calling out for something that can strengthen its power.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.
Your vision expands.  Future missions and exits will be scouted just a little better.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact will empower the island and unlock a permanent upgrade for all future runs.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED UPGRADE: Scouting 1

name: Upgrade: Scouting Clairvoyance 1
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Higher Viewpoint from notes on the psychic and things that belong to the dead.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: See everything near you for a short time when beginning a mission.

effect.u_message:
Somehow, you understand the statue is calling out for something that can strengthen its power.

Your vision expands.  You will see everything near you for a short time when beginning a mission.

ASSOCIATED UPGRADE: Scouting Clairvoyance 1

//: The clay urn is craftable, the porcelain urn is 100% likely to be found in retirement centers and a crystal urn can be found in one mansion out of two.

name: Upgrade: Scouting Clairvoyance 2
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the All-Seeing Effigy from the remains of the observers and detection tools.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: See everything near you at the start of a mission of a longer time.
